batch_summary.note: Jul-Aug 2024. Aug 4 mega-cluster (EP-0854 311 msgs). RF-04/RF-05/RF-07/RF-08 all active. RF-15 cross-references in notes but no standalone primary RF-15 flag — the mega-cluster involves DARVO and legal threats but the false allegation mechanism in this window belongs to B-016 (Jun 2024) and B-018-B-019 (Sep-Oct 2024) flanking batches.
